overall.description: A cable car journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis at night, traveling along elevated wires above a busy neon-lit avenue before banking right to reveal a large multi-level traffic roundabout. The scene features wet reflective surfaces, holographic billboards, palm trees, and dense futuristic vehicle traffic characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cable car route over neon-lit urban avenue

agents.ego_description: traveling steadily along elevated cable line above the multi-lane avenue, rain visible on the lens

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screen displaying advertisements on the left side of the avenue
multi-level highway structure spanning across the avenue in the distance
tall palm tree trunk visible on the left side of the street below
illuminated signage and window lights on commercial buildings to the right

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-angle view from a cable car moving above a rain-soaked cyberpunk avenue. Neon-lit billboards and building signs illuminate the left and right sides while an elevated highway overpass looms ahead. Dense vehicle traffic moves along the wet asphalt below, with palm trees lining the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching major intersection via elevated cable line

events.description: camera banks right and begins descent, revealing large circular roundabout intersection below

agents.ego_description: continuing along the cable line while gradually descending and beginning to turn right toward the intersection

entered.detail: large horizontal billboard with 'El Mundo' text visible on the left side of the roundabout
large circular traffic intersection with multiple lanes of moving vehicles
illuminated yellow arrow signs directing traffic flow on the road below

segments.scene_description: The cable car continues forward while descending slightly, passing palm tree canopies. Around 32 seconds, the camera banks right to reveal a massive circular roundabout intersection below. The 'El Mundo' billboard becomes visible on the left as the previous avenue billboards pass out of view, and the elevated highway structure draws closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular intersection with converging highway ramps

agents.ego_description: descending and curving around the roundabout, observing the heavy traffic circulation below from an angled overhead perspective

notable_agents.action: white sedan navigating the roundabout below the cable car

entered.detail: multiple digital billboards and screens mounted on the roundabout central island
orange traffic cones and barriers lining the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the cable car descending and curving around the large roundabout intersection. The 'El Mundo' billboard is now prominent on the left at close range, while digital advertising screens illuminate the central island. Heavy traffic circulates below on the wet roads, with the elevated highway ramp structure visible ahead and traffic cones lining the right side of the approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high-altitude glide over a neon-lit avenue to a descending curve around a massive urban intersection. It begins with a high-angle view above a rain-soaked street where neon billboards and palm trees flank a dense stream of vehicle traffic moving toward an elevated highway overpass. As the cable car descends slightly through the palm canopies, the camera banks right, shifting the perspective away from the initial avenue to reveal a sprawling circular roundabout below. The scene then opens further to bring a prominent El Mundo billboard into close range on the left while digital advertising screens illuminate the central island of the intersection. Finally, the camera curves around the roundabout, gliding over wet roads filled with circulating traffic and passing traffic cones toward the looming structure of the highway ramp.
